mnemonics.title: Memory Hierarchy: RSLG
mnemonics.content: Remember the GPU memory hierarchy from fastest to slowest: Registers, Shared, L-caches (L1/L2), Global -- 'Racing Speeds Leave GPUs happy'

mnemonics.title: SM Components: CWTS
mnemonics.content: Key SM components: CUDA cores, Warp schedulers, Tensor cores, SFUs -- 'Computing With Tremendous Speed'
